result.last_ag: Haiku generated 12 FAQs, welcome flow, keyword map, and fallback text
result.activity_text: Phase 2 complete: 12 FAQs + welcome flow generated via Haiku

parameters.jsCode:
// Simulate Haiku copy generation (replace with actual Anthropic API call)
const brand = $json.brand_voice;
const policy = $json.policy;

const faqs = [
  { q: 'What is your turnaround?', a: `Hey! We run ${policy.turnaround} on most orders. Rush jobs? Hit us up, we can usually squeeze you in.` },
  { q: 'Do you do bulk discounts?', a: 'Absolutely — 10+ pieces kicks in the bulk tier. I'll quote you properly, no guesswork.' },
  { q: 'What file types do you need?', a: 'PDF or high-res PNG works best. 300dpi minimum so the transfer pops. Not sure? Send what you have, I'll check it.' },
  { q: 'Can I see a sample first?', a: 'Yep — $15 sample fee, credited back when you place the full order. Smart move.' },
  { q: 'Do you ship?', a: 'We do! AusPost tracked. Local pickup from the workshop in Marrickville too.' },
  { q: 'What's your refund policy?', a: `${policy.refund} refund or reprint if the transfer fails. We stand behind the work.` },
  { q: 'Minimum order?', a: 'No minimum. One tee? No worries. That's the beauty of DTF.' },
  { q: 'Can you match my brand colours?', a: 'We colour-match from Pantone or hex. Send your brand guide and I'll nail it.' },
  { q: 'How do I pay?', a: 'Invoice via email — bank transfer or card. 50% deposit to lock in, balance on pickup/dispatch.' },
  { q: 'Do you do reprints?', a: 'Mistakes happen — we'll reprint and reship at our cost if it's our fault.' },
  { q: 'Artwork help?', a: 'Basic cleanup included. Full design? We partner with a studio — I can intro you.' },
  { q: 'Rush order?', a: 'Same-day available for small runs before 10am. Call first, I'll confirm capacity.' }
];

const welcome = `Hey there! 👋 Welcome to Evermystic.

I'm Stefan (well, my bot is — I'm the human behind it). Drop me a message about your print job and I'll get you sorted fast.

Quick links:
• Quote: just say

`;
